title: The Battle for Syrup Village Escalates
description: On pages 1–4, the battle for Syrup Village intensifies as the Straw Hats, Usopp, and the village’s defenders confront Kuro’s pirates.
scene: The quiet village becomes a battlefield, with Usopp’s lies turning into real courage and the Straw Hats forcing Kuro’s plan to unravel.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Oh no, that guy took zero's Katanas!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Isn't your Katana already in your hand?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Oh right, before the battle starts...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Get this junk out of the way

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: How could he treat my Katanas like this!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Did you think you actually cut me just now?

summary: This part pushes the arc from conspiracy into open battle, testing Usopp’s courage and the Straw Hats’ trust in him.
